data.title: Satya Nadella says AI race will be won by countries that secure cheap, reliable energy first
data.description:
Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said the global AI race will not be decided by software alone. He said energy costs will decide which countries pull ahead and which ones fall behind. Satya spoke at the World Economic Forum on Tuesday as governments rush to build AI infrastructure to chase productivity gains and economic growth. He […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/satya-nadella-says-who-wins-ai-race/

data.title: Robinhood launches MNT
data.description: According to market sources, Robinhood has launched MNT.

data.title: BitMine disclosed that it increased its holdings by 35,268 ETH last week, bringing its total holdings to approximately 4.203 million ETH.
data.description: Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies disclosed its current crypto asset holdings, including 4,203,036 ETH, 192 BTC, $22 million worth of Eightco Holdings equity, and $979 million in cash-free assets. It added 35,268 ETH last week. (PRNewswire)

data.title: ETHGas Foundation: GWEI token airdrop pricing website is now live.
data.description: The ETHGas Foundation announced on the X platform that the GWEI token airdrop eligibility website is now live, and reward claims will begin at 21:00 Beijing time on January 21st. Eligibility is primarily determined by two criteria: the user's historical Ethereum mainnet gas consumption recorded when generating their Gas ID before the snapshot, serving as "proof of use"; and verified social participation in ETHGas and the "Gas-Free Future Community Initiative".

data.title: Backpack Wallet launches Solana zero-fee trading service
data.description: Backpack Wallet has announced a zero-fee trading experience on the Solana network, with no fees charged for token swaps and cross-chain bridging. This offer is currently only available to Backpack Wallet users.

data.title: Trend Research withdrew another 7,960 ETH from Binance, worth $24.74 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, Trend Research just withdrew another 7,960 ETH ($24.74 million) from Binance, bringing their total purchases for today to 17,899 ETH ($55.58 million). They now hold a total of 644,600 ETH ($2 billion), with an average cost of $3,182.

data.title: The former FTX EU team launched Perpetuals, an AI-powered crypto derivatives platform, which is scheduled to list on Nasdaq this week.
data.description: A team led by Patrick Gruhn and Robin Matzke, former co-founders of FTX Europe (FTX EU), announced the launch of Perpetuals.com (PDC), an AI-powered crypto derivatives platform whose shares will begin trading on Nasdaq this week. Officially launched after Earlyworks Co. acquired Perpetual Markets Ltd., the platform features regulated 24/7 self-clearing trading and blockchain settlement technology. Its goal is to help product issuers create innovative alternatives to the heavily regulated and often predatory Contracts for Difference (CFDs) and perpetual futures markets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: South Korea Uncovers $102 Million Crypto Money Laundering Network
data.description: South Korean customs officials have uncovered a $102 million cryptocurrency money laundering network linked to plastic surgery clinics catering to Chinese tourists. According to NS3.AI, the criminals involved allegedly converted payments from Chinese electronic payment platforms into cryptocurrencies across various jurisdictions before cashing out in South Korea. Authorities have charged three individuals in connection with the scheme and are planning to implement stricter inspections to combat crypto-enabled illicit activities within the expanding medical tourism sector.

data.title: Bridgewater Associates founder Ray Dalio: The monetary order is collapsing.
data.description: Bridgewater Associates founder Ray Dalio stated that the monetary order is collapsing, with fiat currencies and debt no longer held by central banks in the same way. (Jinshi)

data.title: Kazakhstan advances human-centered AI with new law and programs
data.description:
Kazakhstan has taken a major step in human-centered artificial intelligence with its new law on AI, which came into force on January 18. The legislation sets a legal framework that prioritizes individuals, their rights, freedoms, and well-being while regulating the development and use of AI. Core principles of law and fairness, transparency, accountability, and data […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kazakhstan-advances-human-centered-ai/

data.title: Strategy disclosed that it added 22,305 Bitcoins last week.
data.description: According to market sources, Strategy disclosed that it acquired 22,305 bitcoins, worth approximately $2.13 billion, between January 12 and January 18.

data.title: Strategy Acquires 22,305 Bitcoin for $2.13 Billion
data.description: A strategic acquisition has been made involving 22,305 Bitcoin, with a total purchase price of $2.13 billion. According to BWEnews, this significant transaction highlights the ongoing interest and investment in cryptocurrency markets. The purchase reflects a strategic move to bolster holdings in digital assets, underscoring the growing importance of Bitcoin in financial portfolios. This acquisition is part of a broader trend of institutional investments in cryptocurrency, signaling confidence in its long-term value and potential for growth.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC Stablecoins
data.description: Whale Alert has reported the minting of 250 million USDC stablecoins at the USDC Treasury. According to NS3.AI, this substantial increase in supply indicates either a rise in demand or a necessity for liquidity provision. Large minting events like this can impact market liquidity and the dynamics of stablecoin supply.

data.title: World Liberty Financial Faces Controversy Over USD1 Stablecoin Proposal
data.description:
World Liberty Financial (WLFI) is embroiled in controversy following a governance vote on a USD1 stablecoin growth proposal. According to PANews, the community has criticized the exclusion of locked token holders from participating in the vote, which was dominated by a few associated wallets.

On-chain voting data reveals that the top nine wallets controlled approximately 59% of the voting power, with the largest single wallet contributing 18.786%. An anonymous researcher, DeFi^2, highlighted that these crucial votes in favor of the proposal came from addresses linked to the team or strategic partners, leaving many locked token holders without a voice.

Critics argue that the project should prioritize resolving the unlocking issues for investors rather than advancing proposals that could further dilute token holder rights. Project documents indicate that 75% of the protocol's net income is allocated to entities associated with the Trump family, while 25% goes to entities linked to the Witkoff family. WLFI holders do not directly share in the protocol's income.

data.title: Analysis: Wall Street is again betting on the Trump-TACO deal, with market forecasts indicating only a 17% probability of tariffs being imposed on Europe.
data.description: Polymarket data shows that only 17% of users believe Trump's threat to impose all tariffs on Europe will take effect on February 1st. This market sentiment reflects the "TACO" (Trump Always Chickens Out) trading strategy, where investors bet that Trump will eventually abandon his tariff threats. Jim Reid of Deutsche Bank noted that the market "has more room to move," adding that the market has previously suffered losses due to overreacting to tariff threats. UBS Chief Economist Paul Donovan believes the market is behaving rationally, and bond investors do not seem to be taking these threats too seriously. (Fortune)

data.title: Icon Trading CEO Advocates for Systematic Crypto Trading Approaches
data.description: Suki Yang, CEO of Icon Trading, underscores the importance of scalable and systematic operations in cryptocurrency trading. According to NS3.AI, Yang, who has a background in quantitative research and institutional investing, stresses the significance of risk management, execution efficiency, and repeatability in trading strategies. Icon Trading has developed a unified trading system aimed at delivering consistent and transparent returns for institutional investors.

data.title: Hungarian Regulator Temporarily Blocks Polymarket Domain
data.description: Hungarian regulatory authority Szabályozott Tevékenységek Felügyeleti Hatósága has temporarily blocked the domain and subdomains of the prediction market Polymarket. According to Odaily, the action was taken on the grounds that organizing gambling activities is considered illegal. The restriction will remain in place until the regulatory body completes its review. Users have reported that access to the Polymarket platform is currently unavailable via Hungarian IP addresses.

data.title: India's Crypto Industry Calls for Tax Reforms Ahead of Budget 2026
data.description: India's cryptocurrency sector is pushing for tax reforms in anticipation of Budget 2026, aiming to reduce the 1% TDS and reconsider the 30% VDA tax. According to NS3.AI, these measures are intended to address the migration of traders to offshore platforms. Since their introduction in 2022, these taxes have enhanced traceability but have also led to a significant decrease in onshore liquidity and a rise in offshore trading volumes. Industry leaders caution that offshore trading poses risks to consumer protection, tax revenue, and employment. They are urging the government to develop a regulatory framework that balances compliance with innovation.
